name: @agent-ctrl/cli
description: Cross-platform computer-use framework for AI agents.

scripts.version: npm run version:sync && git add Cargo.toml Cargo.lock
scripts.build:native: npm run version:sync && cargo build --release -p agent-ctrl-cli && node scripts/copy-native.js
scripts.release:dryrun: npm run version:sync && npm run build:windows && npm publish --dry-run --access=public
scripts.release: npm run version:sync && npm run build:windows && npm publish --access=public
